title: deutzia × myriantha
intro: Deutzia × myriantha, also known as a hybrid flowering shrub, is a cross between Deutzia scabra and Deutzia crenata, resulting in a plant with showy white flowers and a compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Deutzia × myriantha are primarily found in its flowers and leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Deutzia × myriantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Deutzia × myriantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
